Radio Button

Select a single option from a group using <lyte-radiobutton> Slyte DOM. Figma: Radio_Base (2205:46587). Includes Radio Button, Radio Group, and Radio Card variants.

Form Figma Synced 7 Tabs — Button + Group + Card
Default — Unselected
Basic
With Hint
Helper text for this option
No Label
HTML
<lyte-radiobutton>
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <span>Option A</span>
  </template>
</lyte-radiobutton>

<!-- With hint -->
<div>
  <lyte-radiobutton>...</lyte-radiobutton>
  <div class="zc-radio-hint">Helper text</div>
</div>
SCSS
/* lyte-radiobutton renders: .lyteRadiobutton > input + .lyteRadioCircle + label */
lyte-radiobutton .lyteRadioCircle {
  width: 16px; height: 16px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
}
.zc-radio-hint {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-subtle, #9EA0A7);
  margin-top: 2px;
  margin-left: 24px;
}
Selected — Active Radio
Selected
With Hint
This option is currently selected
HTML
<lyte-radiobutton lt-prop-checked="true">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <span>Selected Option</span>
  </template>
</lyte-radiobutton>
SCSS
lyte-radiobutton.lyteRadioChecked .lyteRadioCircle {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  border-width: 5px;
}
Hover — Unselected & Selected
Unselected Hover
Selected Hover
HTML
<!-- Hover is automatic via CSS :hover -->
<lyte-radiobutton>
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <span>Hover me</span>
  </template>
</lyte-radiobutton>
SCSS
/* Unselected hover */
lyte-radiobutton:hover .lyteRadioCircle {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default-hover, #696C74);
}
/* Selected hover */
lyte-radiobutton.lyteRadioChecked:hover .lyteRadioCircle {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default-hover, #0B44D5);
}
Disabled — Unselected & Selected
Disabled Unselected
Disabled Selected
HTML
<lyte-radiobutton lt-prop-disabled="true">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <span>Disabled option</span>
  </template>
</lyte-radiobutton>

<lyte-radiobutton lt-prop-checked="true" lt-prop-disabled="true">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <span>Disabled selected</span>
  </template>
</lyte-radiobutton>
SCSS
lyte-radiobutton[lt-prop-disabled="true"] {
  opacity: 0.45;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  pointer-events: none;
}
Radio Group — Vertical
Vertical Group
Select a plan
HTML
<div class="zc-radio-label">Select a plan</div>
<div class="zc-radio-group">
  <lyte-radiobutton>...Free...</lyte-radiobutton>
  <lyte-radiobutton lt-prop-checked="true">...Standard...</lyte-radiobutton>
  <lyte-radiobutton>...Professional...</lyte-radiobutton>
  <lyte-radiobutton>...Enterprise...</lyte-radiobutton>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-radio-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
}
.zc-radio-label {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #37383C;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
Radio Group — Horizontal
Horizontal Group
Frequency
HTML
<div class="zc-radio-label">Frequency</div>
<div class="zc-radio-group zc-radio-group-horizontal">
  <lyte-radiobutton lt-prop-checked="true">...Daily...</lyte-radiobutton>
  <lyte-radiobutton>...Weekly...</lyte-radiobutton>
  <lyte-radiobutton>...Monthly...</lyte-radiobutton>
</div>
Error — Validation State
Error Radio
Error Group
Select one option
Please select an option to continue
HTML
<!-- Error state via class on lyte-radiobutton -->
<lyte-radiobutton class="zc-radio-error">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
    <span>Invalid option</span>
  </template>
</lyte-radiobutton>

<!-- Error group -->
<div class="zc-radio-group zc-radio-error-wrapper">
  <lyte-radiobutton class="zc-radio-error">...Option A...</lyte-radiobutton>
  <lyte-radiobutton class="zc-radio-error">...Option B...</lyte-radiobutton>
</div>
<div class="zc-radio-hint" style="color:#CC1914;">Please select an option</div>
SCSS
lyte-radiobutton.zc-radio-error .lyteRadioCircle {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-error-border-error-border-default, #CC1914);
}
Card — Default
Default
Small
HTML
<div class="zc-radio-card">
  <lyte-radiobutton name="group">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <span class="zc-radio-card-label">Option A</span>
    </template>
  </lyte-radiobutton>
</div>

<!-- Small -->
<div class="zc-radio-card zc-radio-card-sm">...</div>
SCSS
.zc-radio-card {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
  border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #D5D6D9);
  border-radius: 8px; background: #FFFFFF; cursor: pointer;
}
.zc-radio-card-sm { padding: 12px; }
Card — Selected
Selected
HTML
<div class="zc-radio-card zc-radio-card-selected">
  <lyte-radiobutton name="group" lt-prop-checked="true">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <span class="zc-radio-card-label">Option A</span>
    </template>
  </lyte-radiobutton>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-radio-card-selected {
  border-color: var(--zc-color-primary-border-primary-border-default, #0D4EF2);
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-subtle, #F5F8FE);
}
Card — With Icon
With Icon
Selected + Icon
HTML
<div class="zc-radio-card">
  <div class="zc-radio-card-icon"><i class="fas fa-star"></i></div>
  <lyte-radiobutton name="group">
    <template is="registerYield" yield-name="yield">
      <div class="zc-radio-card-content">
        <span class="zc-radio-card-label">Option A</span>
        <span class="zc-radio-card-desc">Description text</span>
      </div>
    </template>
  </lyte-radiobutton>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-radio-card-icon {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-subtle, #F5F8FE);
  color: var(--zc-color-primary-text-primary-text-default, #0D4EF2);
  font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0;
}
Card — Horizontal & Vertical Layout
Horizontal Group
Vertical Group
HTML
<!-- Horizontal -->
<div class="zc-radio-card-group-horizontal">
  <div class="zc-radio-card">...Option A...</div>
  <div class="zc-radio-card zc-radio-card-selected">...Option B...</div>
  <div class="zc-radio-card">...Option C...</div>
</div>

<!-- Vertical -->
<div class="zc-radio-card-group-vertical">
  <div class="zc-radio-card">...Starter...</div>
  <div class="zc-radio-card zc-radio-card-selected">...Professional...</div>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-radio-card-group-horizontal {
  display: flex; flex-direction: row; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.zc-radio-card-group-horizontal > .zc-radio-card {
  flex: 1 1 0; min-width: 160px;
}
.zc-radio-card-group-vertical {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;
}
Card — Disabled
Disabled
Disabled Selected
HTML
<div class="zc-radio-card zc-radio-card-disabled">
  <lyte-radiobutton name="group" lt-prop-disabled="true">...</lyte-radiobutton>
</div>

<div class="zc-radio-card zc-radio-card-selected zc-radio-card-disabled">
  <lyte-radiobutton name="group" lt-prop-checked="true" lt-prop-disabled="true">...</lyte-radiobutton>
</div>
SCSS
.zc-radio-card-disabled {
  opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; pointer-events: none;
}
